name: Implementation Gap Audit — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Audits a customer stack or internal workflow request against the current library to identify what is already validated, what only has recipe coverage, and what still needs productization work before rollout. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Linear connector or approved custom connector for issue routing
Meeting-system connector or approved custom connector for transcript intake
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

trigger_model.recommended_surface: API Platform endpoint or native app event trigger

connectors: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Linear connector or approved custom connector for issue routing

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Implementation Gap Audit trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Implementation Gap Audit business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Implementation Gap Audit, especially Normalize Coverage Request, Compare Against Library.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Implementation Gap Audit.

main_recipes.trigger: API Platform endpoint or native app event trigger
steps: Use meeting-system connector action for Normalize Coverage Request
Use native connector action for Compare Against Library
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for AI Gap Scoring
Use Slack connector for Deliver Backlog Recommendation
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

ai_gap_scoring.intent: AI Agent scores missing adapters, rollout risk, and productization value so the team knows what to build next.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Split fan-out delivery into deterministic recipe-function stages so Slack, Teams, and email stay independently testable.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
